title: LV Prasad Eye Institute is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: LV Prasad Eye Institute is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
LV Prasad Eye Institute, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Allahabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About LV Prasad Eye Institute:
LV Prasad Eye Institute is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LV Prasad Eye Institute!
